infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReceiptGenius needs camera access to scan physical receipts for OCR tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReceiptGenius needs photo library access to upload existing receipt photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ReceiptGenius to access your camera to capture receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ReceiptGenius to access your photos to select receipt images.
